meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no coding experience (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no coding experience. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Build SaaS Without Coding
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no-coding' barrier. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build, launch, and monetize your SaaS product in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop letting technical debt stall your vision. By leveraging the Antigravity project template combined with Claude Code, you can translate business requirements into production-ready architecture instantly. This workflow bypasses manual coding, allowing you to focus purely on product-market fit, rapid iteration, and generating recurring revenue from day one.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with brilliant ideas that never saw the light of day simply because the founder lacked a technical co-founder. You're staring at a blank screen, knowing exactly what your users need, yet the syntax of software development feels like an impenetrable wall. You don't need a CS degree; you need a system that forces execution.

The Antigravity project template is that system. It bridges the gap between 'I have an idea' and 'My server is live.' By pairing this structural template with the raw reasoning power of Claude Code, you shift from being a bottleneck to a high-velocity product architect. It’s time to stop dreaming and start shipping.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational architecture to ensure your SaaS is scalable from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, production-ready SaaS scaffold using the Antigravity template, including authentication, database schema for user management, and a stripe-ready billing module.

steps.title: Define Your Data Schema
steps.description: Map your business logic to a database schema to ensure data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my business requirement: [Insert Idea]. Create a comprehensive SQL schema with relations for Users, Subscriptions, and Core Data entities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on user requirements'

steps.title: Build the Core MVP Feature
steps.description: Focus on the 'Hair-on-Fire' problem. Build the one feature that justifies a paid subscription.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build the core feature logic for [Feature Name]. Ensure high-performance execution and error handling, following the Antigravity project patterns.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Integration
steps.description: Connect your application to the global economy. Don't build custom payment flows; use the template's existing hooks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Stripe Webhook handler and subscription service within the existing Antigravity structure.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Move from local environment to a live URL, ready for your first users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Prepare the deployment configuration and environment variables for a Vercel-ready production build.

pro_tips: Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Dollar' over feature parity; cut every non-essential field from your database.
Use Claude Code to write automated E2E tests for your payment flow before deploying to production.
Keep your Antigravity template updated by running a git-diff against the latest upstream repository weekly.
Focus on 'Logging-first' architecture; ensure every user action is tracked so you can identify churn points early.
Don't build custom auth; use the template's pre-configured Auth0 or Clerk integration to save 40+ hours of setup.
content.next_steps: After deployment, focus on your first 10 users. Use their feedback to iterate on the MVP using the same Claude Code pipeline you used to build it.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the technical leverage to outpace incumbents and dominate your niche. Do not let this moment pass—your market is waiting for your solution. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
